findings.description: Section s2 hints are missing 8 property names from the CustomTagConfig table: port, securePort, host, yyyymmddPattern, dateTimePattern, patternSeparator, scriptBodyPrefix, scriptBodySuffix
findings.source_evidence: Source table (カスタムタグのデフォルト値の設定) lists these as first-column property names: port, securePort, host, yyyymmddPattern, dateTimePattern, patternSeparator, scriptBodyPrefix, scriptBodySuffix
